summary: Mental health quiz app for young women
architectural_notes: Quiz-based interface for mental health assessment
Authentication system using Internet Identity for secure passkey-based login
User profile storage to persist quiz results and history

existing_features.title: Create a mental health quiz interface with multiple-choice questions focused on mental wellness topics relevant to young women
Display quiz results with supportive feedback based on the user's answers
Apply a warm, calming, and supportive visual design theme that resonates with young women seeking mental health support, using soft color palettes and approachable typography throughout the interface
Integrate Internet Identity authentication to allow users to sign up and log in securely using passkey-based authentication
Create a user profile or history page where authenticated users can view their past quiz results and track their mental wellness journey over time
Update the quiz submission flow to use the authenticated actor when users are logged in, ensuring their results are saved to their account

new_feature_requests.summary: Store quiz questions and answer options in the backend with support for adding new questions
Save user quiz responses in the backend to track progress over time
Add user sign-up and authentication feature with Internet Identity
Enable users to save and track their quiz results over time
Associate quiz responses with authenticated user principals in the backend to enable personalized result tracking
Add backend functions to retrieve a user's quiz history based on their Principal, including timestamps and scores
